description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a covered entryway with steps leading up to a dark-colored door, flanked by large windows and a garage to the left. The house is set back from the street with a paved driveway and a fenced yard, surrounded by several large, leafy trees providing shade and privacy. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a spacious backyard, enclosed by fencing. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and a balanced window arrangement.
description: A two-story Colonial-style house with a gable roof, large windows, a covered entryway, and a fenced yard shaded by mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and the large tree dominating the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with the backyard and fencing visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the entryway, side yard, and a single large tree to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, a single front door, and flanking windows; no porch or columns, simple overhang.
